entries.description: Read CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md (structure and edit points). Read workflow doc lines 1-60 (opening + structure) and 630-832 (config block + UAT sections before Step 0). Read adoption-bootstrap.md Step 6 pattern catalog (lines 245-297). Confirmed wizard sessionGenPrompt.ts spec template.

Authored docs/quick-start.md v1: adoption paths, minimal spec scaffold, 5-step happy path. Verification round 1 (GPT-5.4, $0.0396): ISSUES_FOUND — quick-start doesn't stand alone; no concrete runbook. Fixed: added 'Run your first session' section with prerequisites, human/agent actions, success indicators, common failures.

Verification round 2 (GPT-5.4, $0.0634): ISSUES_FOUND — missing minimal spec.md skeleton beyond config block; missing exact activity-log.json path and minimal content. Fixed: replaced the brief 'minimal spec' with a complete spec.md example (YAML fences with Goal/Deliverables/Session Plan sections) and added activity-log.json path + minimal JSON example.

Verification round 3 (GPT-5.4, $0.0396): ISSUES_FOUND — Full-tier setup prerequisites not explicit before the runbook; instruction-file requirement not stated; consumer count wrong ('Three active consumer repos use Full' but only two named). All three fixed: added Full-tier setup checklist (API keys, instruction file, bootstrap); fixed consumer count to 'Two'; added instruction-file requirement to checklist. 2-retry limit reached; no further verification route. Findings all correct and conservative.

Added quick-nav callout + 'skip if requiresUAT:false' divider block to workflow doc. Simplified spec template in workflow doc and wizard. Added Quick Start sections to CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md. Simplified adoption-bootstrap.md pattern catalog (7 abstract patterns -> 3 concrete examples + 'going deeper' pointer).
Committed Session 1 deliverables as 7aba912. Not pushed — holding for end-of-set per operator's autonomous-execution request.

Confirmed no v1 session-state.json files in docs/session-sets/ (grep found only doc references to schema version 1, not actual state files). Safe to archive migration utilities. v1 compat code in session_state.py left intact pending consumer repo audit.

Created ai_router/queue_verification.py with _MessageOutcome, _discover_queue_providers, _lookup_message, _wait_for_verifications, DEFAULT_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS extracted from close_session.py. Edited close_session.py to import from queue_verification. Encountered partial-edit issue (section header replaced but function bodies remained orphaned); repaired with Python script by removing orphaned content at exact byte offsets. Added _discover_queue_providers and _lookup_message to imports (needed by _run_repair in close_session.py).

Moved backfill_session_state.py and dump_session_state_schema.py to ai_router/scripts/ using git mv. Moved their tests with them (test_dump_session_state_schema.py and test_session_state_backfill.py). Test collection error surfaced (module not found) — fixed by moving both test files alongside their modules.

Added 4-line orientation docstrings to 7 modules (close_session, gate_checks, session_state, notifications, worktree, queue_db, queue_verification). Added 10-line module map comment to ai_router/__init__.py. All edits additive to existing docstrings.
python -m pytest ai_router/tests/ (excluding test_restart_role.py): 679 passed. 50 tests correctly moved to scripts/ with their modules. No regressions.
Committed Session 2 as 39f41ad. Pushed both sessions (7aba912 + 39f41ad) together plus close-out artifacts. Ran close_session.
